source_rationale: KRT7 is a type II cytokeratin expressed in simple epithelia, marking this as an epithelial cell cluster
KRT19 is a cytokeratin characteristic of ductal and glandular epithelial cells
CDH1 (E-cadherin) is a hallmark adhesion molecule of epithelial cells
ELF3 is an epithelial-specific ETS transcription factor important in epithelial differentiation
MMP7 is a matrix metalloproteinase expressed by epithelial cells, particularly in airway epithelium
TACSTD2 (TROP2) is a cell surface glycoprotein highly expressed in epithelial cells
CLDN4 is a tight junction protein characteristic of epithelial barrier cells
CD24 is a GPI-anchored protein expressed on epithelial progenitor cells
GPRC5A is a retinoic acid-induced receptor enriched in lung epithelial cells
MHC class II molecule highly expressed on professional antigen-presenting cells including dendritic cells
WDFY4 is specifically expressed in conventional dendritic cells type 1 (cDC1) and is required for cross-presentation
CST3 (cystatin C) is highly expressed in dendritic cells and monocytes
ZBTB46 is a transcription factor that specifically marks conventional dendritic cells
CD74 (invariant chain) is essential for MHC class II antigen presentation in dendritic cells
HLA-DRA is a core MHC class II alpha chain expressed on antigen-presenting cells
CPVL is a carboxypeptidase enriched in dendritic cells involved in antigen processing
MHC class II expression indicates antigen-presenting cell identity
AREG (amphiregulin) is produced by activated dendritic cells and macrophages for tissue repair
CCL17 is a chemokine produced by activated dendritic cells, especially cDC2
RGS1 is upregulated in tissue-resident and activated dendritic cells
GPR183 (EBI2) is an oxysterol receptor important for dendritic cell positioning and migration
AXL is a receptor tyrosine kinase marking a transitional DC population (AS-DC/AXL+ DC)
CD74 is the MHC class II invariant chain essential for antigen presentation
